verses.text: Ni khat, Gaza khua-ah Samson pai a, tua lai-ah numei paktat khat mu-in tuanu kiangah a giak dingin a pai hi

Gaza mite kiangah, “Samson hong pai,” ci-in kigen a, amaute in tua khua umcihin khuapi kulhkongpi-ah zan tawntung amah pangsim uh hi. Amaute zan tawntung daitakin om uh a, “Zingsang khuavak mateng ngak ni; tua ciangin amah that ni,” ci uh hi

Ahih hangin zankim ciangdong Samson lum a, zankim ciangin tho-in khuapi kulhkongpi kongkhakte leh a khuam nihte lenin a zawlte leh a na khempeuh botto a, a liangko tungah tuate pua-in Hebron mai-ah a om mual dawnah tuate a tun'pih hi.
Tua khit ciangin Samson in Sorek kuamah Delilah a kici numei khat ngai hi

Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante tuanu kiangah hong pai-in, “Amah hong zol in la, ama hatna koi-ah om hiam cihna leh amah i nuaisiah zawhna dingin amah i hen theihna ding, amah i zawh theihna ding zia hong thei in. Na theihzawh leh ngun pek tul leh za khat ciat nang kong pia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Delilah in Samson kiangah, “Na hatna lian koi-ah om a, mi khatpeuh in nang hong zawhtheihna dingin hong bangci kihen ding cihna thu, nong hehpihna-in hong gen in,” a ci hi
Samson in tuanu kiangah, “Amaute in a keu nailo thalkhau thak sagih tawh hong hen leh ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante in tuanu kiangah a keu nailo thalkhau sagih hong paipih uh a, tuanu in tua khaute tawh amah a hen hi

Tua laitakin tuanu in inndei sungah mi busak hi. Tua ciangin tuanu in ama kiangah, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. Ahih hangin, patkhaute in mei a sukkhak ciangin a kitah bangin amah in thalkhaute botsat ziau hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama thahatna thusim kithei zolo hi
Tua ciangin Delilah in Samson kiangah, “En in, kei nong simmawh a, zuauthu nong gen hi. Nang hong bangci kihen theih ding cih nong hehpihna-in hong gen in,” a ci hi
Amah in tuanu kiangah, “Amaute in a kizang nailo khauhual thakte tawh kei hong hen leh ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Delilah in khauhual thakte la-in tuate tawh amah hen a, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. A busim mite inndei sungnungah om uh hi. Ahih hangin Samson in mimkhau bangin khauhualte botsat ziau hi

Tua ciangin Delilah in Samson kiangah, “Tudong kei nong simmawh a, zuauthu nong gen hi. Nang hong bangci kihen theih ding cih hong gen in,” a ci hi. Amah in tuanu kiangah, “Ka lu tunga ka sam lom sagihte mimkhau tawh ganin ciampek tawh khen bikbek lecin ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah a ihmut laitakin a lu tunga a sam lom sagihte la-in siamin a gan hi. Amah in ciampek tawh khen bikbek a, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a ihmutna pan amah khanglo-in a ciampek, a siambu, leh a siam a kaikhia hi

Tua ciangin numei in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin na lungsim kei tawh a omlopi, ‘Nang kong it hi,’ ci thei na hi hiam? Hih thumvei dong kei nong simmawh a, na thahatna a omna mun nong gen kei hi,” a ci hi
Nisimin nakpi takin a kutkut ciangin, sihna dong dingin Samson lunggim hi

Amah in tuanu kiangah a lungsim khempeuh gen a, “Ka lu tungah mulkiatna kitah ngeilo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka suah tunga kipan Pasian' tungah a kipia Nazir mi ka hi hi. Ka sam kimet leh ka hatna in kei hong nusia ding a, ka tha nem ding a, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi

Ama tungah a lungsim khempeuh gen khin hi, ci-in Delilah in a theih ciangin amah in mi sawlin Filistia mi uliante sam a, “Tu-a khatvei hong pai un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a lungsim khempeuh kei kiangah hong gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Filistia uliante tuanu kiangah hong pai-in sum zong hong pua uh hi
Tuanu in a phei tungah Samson ihmusak hi. Amah in mi khat samin a lu tunga a sam lom sagihte metsak hi. Tua ciangin tuanu in amah gimsak ding kipan a, ama thahatna in amah nusia ta hi

Tuanu in, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. A ihmutna panin amah khanglo-in, “Nidanga mah bangin paikhia-in keimah kisingin suakta ning,” a ci hi. Topa in amah a nusiat khitlam amah in theilo hi
Tua ciangin Filistia mite in amah manin a mitte khelkhia uh a, Gaza-ah paipihin amah sumngo kol a bulh uh hi. Amah in thong sung an gawina-ah an a gawi hi
Ahih hangin a kimet khit ciangin a lu tunga a samte khangkik dingin hong kipan hi.

Tu-in Filistia uliante a pasian uh Dagon tungah biakna lianpi khat a pia ding leh a gualnuam dingin kikhawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I pasian in i khutsungah i galpa Samson hong piazo hi,” a ci uh hi
Mite in amah a muh ciangun a pasian uh phat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I pasian in eite' khutsungah i gam a susiapa, eite tampi hong thatpa hong piazo hi,” a ci uh hi

A lungsim uh a nop ciangin amaute in, “Eite-a' dingin a kimawl theihna dingin Samson sam un,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in thong panin Samson samkhia-in amau' mai-ah mawlpih uh hi. Khuampite kikalah amah kidingsak hi
Samson in ama khut a len tangvalpa kiangah, “Ka kingak theihna dingin innpite a do khuampite hong lawngsak in,” a ci hi
Tua laitakin a innpi pen numei leh pasal tawh kidim hi. Samson a kimawlsak laitakin a en Filistia ulian khempeuh leh innkhum zangah numei leh pasal mi tul thum bang om uh hi

Tua ciangin Samson in Topa samin, “ Topa Pasian aw, kei hong phawk in, kong thum hi. Tu-a ka mittang nihte' tangdingin Filistia mite ka thuktheihna dingin hong thahatsak in, tu-a bek kong thum hi,” a ci hi
Samson in innpi a do khuampi nihte manin, a khut taklamin khat, a khut veilamin khat lenin ama gihna tawh a khuamte a luai hi

Samson in, “Filistia mite tawh hong sisak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a thaneih khempeuh tawh a awn hi. Tua ciangin uliante leh inn sunga om mi khempeuh tungah a innpi kicimsuk hi. Tua ahih ciangin a nuntak lai-a a thah sangin a sihna-a a thah a si mi tamzaw hi

Tua ciangin a sanggam pasalte leh a innkuanpihte khempeuh hong paisukin a luanghawm la uh a, ciahpihto-in Zorah leh Eshtaol kikala om a pa Manoah' hanah a vui uh hi. Amah in Israel-te kum sawmnih sung thu a khen hi.
